detectors.description: Token.recordDividend() (contracts/Token.sol#195-206) use msg.value in a loop: share = msg.value.mul(balanceOf[holder]).div(supply) (contracts/Token.sol#201)

Token.burn(address).dest (contracts/Token.sol#164) lacks a zero-check on :
		- dest.transfer(amount) (contracts/Token.sol#175)

Token.withdrawDividend(address).dest (contracts/Token.sol#215) lacks a zero-check on :
		- dest.transfer(amount) (contracts/Token.sol#224)
Modifier Migrations.restricted() (contracts/Migrations.sol#7-9) does not always execute _; or revert
detectors.markdown: Modifier [Migrations.restricted()](contracts/Migrations.sol#L7-L9) does not always execute _; or revert

detectors.description: solc-0.7.0 is an outdated solc version. Use a more recent version (at least 0.8.0), if possible.

detectors.description:
Version constraint 0.7.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- 0.7.0 (contracts/Migrations.sol#1)
